decision.summary: Both BTC price-hit slots are already filled, so there is no clean new edge to add.
decision.rationale: Beecthor's new video keeps the broader bearish-corrective thesis but still favors one more upside push toward 78.5k and the 79k-80k area before the cleaner short setup. The portfolio already has the weekly BTC $80k reach position open and the daily BTC $75k dip position open, so both allowed BTC price-hit slots are occupied. Neither position is near take-profit, there is no floor setup in context, and adding a third correlated BTC position would break slot discipline without improving setup quality.
